action.reasoning: Observation: Best mean_r2 is 0.4919 from an 11M-param 5-layer MLP trained 5 epochs. ptend_q is the weakest group (0.3004). Analysis: The model is underfitting the harder humidity tendencies. We have 3.6 hours and 23 iterations left. The training pipeline is validated. To improve, we need more model capacity and longer training. Decision: Upgrade to a deeper residual MLP (~42M params, 5 residual blocks at width 2048) with LayerNorm and SiLU. Increase batch size to 4096 for speed, train for 10 epochs with cosine LR (1.5e-3), dropout 0.0. Also update train.py to log realistic validation R2 by zeroing columns 60-80 during metric computation. Save new checkpoint and submit eval in next step.
